summary: Increased response time detected for the User Service API leading to degradation of service performance.

anomaly_findings.description: Response time exceeded the acceptable threshold.
Error rate for the service exceeded acceptable levels.

error_patterns.description: Internal Server Error during API calls.
Resource not found for user profile fetch.

candidate_root_cause_hypotheses: Recent deployment introduced a bug causing server instability.
Database connectivity issues leading to timeouts and service degradation.
Increased traffic without proportional scaling of resources.

lines: 2023-10-01 12:00:00 ERROR User Service - Internal Server Error: Unable to process request.
